search_focus: Commercial shop listings on 99acres.com in areas NEAR Sankarankovil including Tirunelveli, Tenkasi, Kadayanallur, Rajapalayam, VM Chatram, Maharaja Nagar, Alangulam, and Thachanallur
search_methodology: Yahoo search engine queries + direct page scraping via curl of RealEstateIndia.com and other property listing sites. 99acres.com was completely blocked (Akamai/EdgeSuite). z-ai web_search and page_reader APIs were persistently rate-limited (HTTP 429). Google, DuckDuckGo, and Bing all showed CAPTCHA/bot challenges. agent-browser was also blocked by 99acres.com. Primary data extracted from RealEstateIndia.com listing pages with full descriptions.

best_location_near_bus_stand.description: Opposite to Government Hospital bus stop, Very busy area, Maharaja Nagar

recommended_next_steps: 1. Visit 99acres.com DIRECTLY IN A WEB BROWSER and search 'commercial shops for rent' in each target area to get actual owner contact numbers
2. Visit the RealEstateIndia.com listing URLs provided above and click 'Contact Seller' to reveal phone numbers (requires browser)
3. Call NEST Real Estate at 7010284245 (WhatsApp available) - they cover Sankarankovil and surrounding areas
4. Call Sri Kaveri Agency at +91-9500698281 or +91-9944315171 for Sankarankovil property assistance
5. Visit MagicBricks.com in browser - search 'commercial shops for rent in Tirunelveli' for cross-verified listings with contact details
6. Visit Housing.com in browser - has 28+ commercial properties listed for Tirunelveli Town
7. Check OLX.in in browser for Sankarankovil (sankarankoil) area - multiple shop listings available
8. Call the potential phone number 9486488618 found in the Rajapalayam listing page source
9. Join Facebook group 'Sankarankovil Properties (Buy, Sale & Rent)' at https://www.facebook.com/groups/SankarankovilPropertiesAds/
10. For Tenkasi area (closest to Sankarankovil), visit 99acres.com/search 'commercial shop rent Tenkasi Tamil Nadu' in browser

limitations.primary_limitation: 99acres.com completely blocks all server/cloud IPs via Akamai/EdgeSuite CDN. No individual listing pages were accessible through any method (direct curl, agent-browser, or search engine).
limitations.secondary_limitation: z-ai SDK web_search and page_reader APIs were persistently rate-limited (HTTP 429) across the entire session, preventing use of AI-powered search.
limitations.tertiary_limitation: All major search engines (Google, DuckDuckGo, Bing) showed CAPTCHA/bot challenges from the server IP. Only Yahoo search worked without challenges.
limitations.contact_limitation: Property owner/broker contact phone numbers on RealEstateIndia.com are hidden behind interactive 'Contact Seller' buttons that require JavaScript execution and form submission. These cannot be accessed via server-side scraping.
data_sources: RealEstateIndia.com (primary - 22 listings with descriptions, sizes, prices)
Yahoo search engine (supplementary - confirmed platform URLs)
Previous session data (99acres-search2.json - broker/agent contacts in Sankarankovil)
